title: MirageCraft Pixelmon
description: Catch and train over thousands of Pokémon in Minecraft through our Pixelmon server and community! Make friends along the way!
body:
![Promo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Pmon/BH_MC_PROMO.webp)[Use code MIRAGECRAFT to get 25% OFF on BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/miragecraft?r=modrinth)

![MirageCraft](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Pmon/BH_MC_HEADER.webp)

**Server IP:** mc.miragecraft.net

**Website:** https://miragecraft.net/portal

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/miragecraft

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Pmon/BH_MC_BANNER2.webp)

If you love Pokémon and Minecraft, why not try both at the same time? MirageCraft is a server running the Pixelmon mod, which recreates the classic Pokémon games in a Minecraft world. You can catch, train, battle, trade, and breed over 1000 Pokémon, all while building and crafting items in the style that has made Minecraft the most popular game on the planet. Choose a starter and journey across a wide open map, crafting poké balls to catch more for your team. Settle down and build the most impressive house you can imagine while training your Pokémon to take on gyms or other players! MirageCraft strives to create the experience of living in a Pokémon world.


Established in 2013, MirageCraft is one of the best and well-known Pixelmon communities, and it has persisted because the goal of the server is to provide the best experience possible for the players. Enjoy no lag and frequently planned events while you set on your Pokémon journey, aided by a friendly staff and a player base that has become like a family. We offer ranks earned through gameplay and encourage players to team up with others to become stronger! We’d love to have you join us!

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/m4RjPjx.png)
